scenario: Lobsters work session - audit the Story contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Story contract and what it is built on
Trace how a story is created and ranked
Audit every dependent of the Story contract
Trace how story identity and visibility are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change

misses.detail: pre-MCP bypasses: 0, post-MCP verification reads: 0, post-MCP misses: 6 (diagnostic only — grep_count drives fluency)
